record.field: Industry Lawyer: Split SO per Claimant

mail_compose_partners = record.partner_ids suggested_approval = mail_compose_partners[:1].mapped('x_suggest_approval') if suggested_approval: record.write({'x_approval': suggested_approval[0]}) partners = [(4, pid) for pid in set(mail_compose_partners.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimants').ids)] is_user_high_group = env.user.has_group('industry_lawyer.group_high') record.write({'partner_ids': partners, 'x_is_user_high_group': is_user_high_group})
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Mail Compose
